title: Biden Makes Flawed Comparisons with Trump
content:
Biden Makes Flawed Comparisons with Trump. During a speech in South Carolina on Feb. 27, Joe Biden touted his record as president while criticizing his successor, President Donald Trump. But during his remarks, Biden made a number of false, misleading or exaggerated claims.

The post Biden Makes Flawed Comparisons with Trump appeared first on FactCheck.org.
